ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee joined the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job title or role within the company */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the employee is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Project management methodology used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_projects" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee assigned to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project assigned to the employee */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the project */,
  "allocation_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the employee's time allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_projects_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_timelines" (
  "timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project timeline record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being tracked */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee assigned to the project */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was assigned to the project */,
  "estimated_end_date" TEXT /* Estimated end date for the task */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date once the task is completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_timelines_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_timelines_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., project manager, team member) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment takes effect */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Details about the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
